title: Day 4 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - いつもどこでしゅくだいをしますか。(Itsumo doko de shukudai o shimaska?) = Where do you usually do your homework?

Sentence 2 - としょかんでします。(Toshokan de shimas) = At the library.

Sentence 3 - ときどききっさてんでします。(Tokidoki kissaten de shimas) = Sometimes at the coffee shop.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
